name: schema-registry-dag-schema-index-manager
description: T195 SchemaIndexManager — SCHEDULED archetype. Rebuilds schema search index periodically. Tenant-scoped index entries. GLOBAL vs PRIVATE scope propagated from source schema record.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: scheduled entry pattern, tenant-scoped index rebuild, GLOBAL vs PRIVATE scope propagation, no direct tenant cross-read
Retrieve SCHEDULED arch pattern + tenant-scoped-index + scope-propagation + index-rebuild patterns for T195
Break T195 into: scheduled trigger → load all schemas for tenant → propagate GLOBAL/PRIVATE scope from source record → rebuild search index entries → store updated index document

Generate schema-index-manager.service.ts — CRON or queue-scheduled trigger, reads schemas from DATABASE with tenant scope isolation (ALS), propagates scope=GLOBAL or scope=PRIVATE from source schema record onto index entry. NEVER cross-reads other tenants. DNA-8: storeDocument index BEFORE any downstream notification.
Named check validation: scheduled_entry_only, tenant_scope_isolated, global_private_scope_from_source, index_entries_tenant_scoped, no_cross_tenant_read
Score generated code 0-100 against T195 iron rules: scheduled entry, tenant isolation, scope propagation, index rebuild correctness
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=scheduled-entry+tenant-scoped+scope-propagated-from-source, rejected=http-triggered-index-rebuild OR cross-tenant-read OR scope-hardcoded-not-from-source. curriculumTier=1.
